innerConflict.completedNote: This conflict is resolved. GM may reopen.

magicSkill.castNote: Triggers VFX and sound on all clients.

npc.promoteConfirm: Promote {name} to Connection? They'll gain a resolve track, impressions, and a theme. Bio, description, scene info, and personas are preserved.

family.criteriaPlaceholder: A daughter of this house is judged by…
family.criteriaNote: — shown read-only on every member Major's tab
family.noMembers: No Major characters linked to this family yet.

connection.hoverSummaryPlaceholder: What appears when a player mouses over this connection's token.

public.criteriaEmpty: No reputation criteria set for this family.
public.innerConflictRule: complete at 6 total or 5 on one side

private.noConnections: Drag a Connection here, or click + to create one.

reputationCriteria.body: Family-specific judgment the world applies to all members of this house. Set on the Family sheet — read-only here.

reputationTags.body: Adjectives the world has begun to associate with this character. Three of one polarity triggers a Reputation Condition.

activeConditions.body: Lasting social consequences earned by reputation. Each shapes how the world treats this character until lifted.

innerConflict.body: Two opposing pressures. Mark a box on either side as your character acts. Completes at 6 total or 5 on one side.

completedConflicts.body: Conflicts this character has resolved. Each grants an Expanded Backstory Action — a tool for shaping the story.

desire.body: What this character wants this cycle. Drives Novel Chapter scenes. May change at Upkeep when a desire-arc wraps.

notesObjectives.body: Player-authored running notes. What is this character paying attention to? What would they like to accomplish next?

connections.body: Other characters this person has formed relationships with. Click any to open their sheet.

backstory.body: The character's history. May grow over time as Expanded Backstory Actions reveal new chapters.

magicSkills.body: Homebrew abilities tied to family bloodline or training. Casting plays an on-screen effect; some trigger persona changes.

adventurerSentiment.body: Pure flavor field. How does this character regard adventurers, freelancers, and the questing rabble?

connectionDescription.body: This connection's bio and personality. Authored by the GM; share ownership with the linked Major's player when appropriate.

impressions.body: What this connection thinks of each Major they've encountered. Shapes how they behave when scenes unfold.

linkedMajor.body: The Major character this connection primarily belongs to. Most connections have one; some are shared.

connectionResolve.body: This connection's smaller resolve track. Default 1 of 5. Used in scenes where they act on their own interests.

personas.body: Alternate identities. Each carries its own name, portrait, and visibility overrides. Switch via the picker.

familyMotto.body: The family's sworn declaration — read aloud at formal toasts and printed on the crest.

familyOrigin.body: The family's social standing: heir (established local nobility), new arrival (recently titled or relocated), or foreign (outsider lineage).

heirStatus.body: Whether the family has a named heir, and in what form. Affects reputation conditions in some scenarios.

uniqueNegativeRepCriteria.body: The standard by which this family's members are judged. Shown read-only on every member Major's Public tab.

familyNotes.body: GM-only history, internal politics, and secrets the players don't know.

memberMajors.body: Major Characters linked to this family. Set a Major's familyId field to add them here.

npcDescription.body: Bio, role, and backstory for this NPC. Longer prose goes here; the Hover Summary is the one-line version for the canvas.

publicTags.body: Short tags visible on the canvas hover card and in the NPC Organizer. Examples: eligible, tradesman, widowed, spy.

hoverSummary.body: The one or two sentences that appear when a player hovers over this character's token on the canvas.

tagPolarity.body: Positive (▲) for desirable traits, Negative (▼) for risky ones. Three of one polarity triggers a Reputation Condition.

tagDescription.body: What this tag means in play. Helps the GM and table understand the tag's narrative weight.

tagSource.body: Where this tag came from — the scene or moment of play that earned it. Shows in the Upkeep review.

conditionActive.body: Whether this Reputation Condition is currently in effect. Auto-deactivates if source tag count drops below 3.

conditionSourceTags.body: The reputation tags that triggered this condition. Removing one may deactivate the condition.

innerConflictLabel.body: The two abstract pressures pulling this character apart — Family vs. Independence, Ambition vs. Love, etc.

magicVfxKey.body: The Sequencer/JB2A asset path that plays when this skill is cast. Optional — falls back to a chat card if missing.

magicHidden.body: Whether this skill is hidden from the Public Info dashboard. Useful for secret abilities.

magicPersonaSwap.body: Casting this skill also switches the character to the named persona. Used for transformation skills like Alter Self.

backstorySource.body: The Inner Conflict whose resolution earned this Backstory Action. Read-only — links to the source conflict.

backstoryStatus.body: Whether this action has been expanded into play and whether it has been used yet.

resolveTrack.body: A character's determination to shape the story. Spend to do something difficult, harm another's interests, or compel them.

mtToggle.body: The Major Threshold marker. Spent to introduce or shape large narrative consequences.

monologueDot.body: Each cycle, this character may take one Inner Monologue — a scene revealing their true thoughts. Cleared at Upkeep.

personaSwitch.whisperNote: whispered to GM and player only

monologueEditor.title: Inner Monologue
monologueEditor.placeholder: What does your character truly feel, in this moment…
monologueEditor.alreadySpent: You have already taken your monologue this cycle.
monologueEditor.emptyWarning: Write something before posting your monologue.

dock.title: My Characters
dock.empty: No characters yet. Open the actors sidebar to create one.

dashboard.title: Public Info · Facilitator Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: All Major characters at a glance · GM controls below · individual sheets remain authoritative.
dashboard.noMajors: No Major characters yet. Create one in the actors sidebar.

bulk.refreshResolveHint: Reset every Major's resolve to the default starting value.
bulk.refreshResolveConfirm: Reset resolve to {n} for all Major characters?
bulk.refreshResolvePosted: Resolve refreshed to {n} for {count} Major characters.
bulk.clearMonologuesHint: Clear the monologue-spent flag on all Majors for a new cycle.
bulk.clearMonologuesConfirm: Clear monologue flags for all Major characters?
bulk.clearMonologuesPosted: Monologue flags cleared for {count} Major characters.
bulk.revealDesiresHint: Toggle all Major desires between public and secret.
bulk.revealDesireConfirm: Make all Major desires public? This is a dramatic move — the table will see them.
bulk.revealDesirePosted: All Major desires are now public.
bulk.hideDesireConfirm: Hide all Major desires? They will return to secret.
bulk.hideDesirePosted: All Major desires are now secret.
bulk.rumourStub: The Rumour & Scandal generator is not yet implemented.
bulk.advancePhaseHint: Advance the world cycle to the next phase.
bulk.advancePhaseConfirm: Advance to the next cycle phase?

tooltipsEnabled.name: Show Rule Tooltips
tooltipsEnabled.hint: Hover any section header (marked with a small ?) to see a paraphrased rule explanation. Disable to hide the ? glyphs and suppress all tooltip hovers.

applyFoundryChrome.name: Apply Foundry Chrome Theme
applyFoundryChrome.hint: Re-themes Foundry's surrounding chrome (titlebars, sidebar, chat log, scene navigation, form controls, notifications, player list, hotbar) to match the Good Society house style. Toggles instantly without a page reload.

autoRefreshOnUpkeep.name: Auto-Refresh Resolve on Upkeep
autoRefreshOnUpkeep.hint: When the cycle advances to Upkeep, visually highlight the Refresh Resolve button on the dashboard. GM still clicks — this never fires automatically.

promptOnThreeTags.name: Prompt on Three Reputation Tags
promptOnThreeTags.hint: When a Major reaches three tags of one polarity, open a reminder to review Reputation Conditions.

defaultMaxResolve.name: Default Maximum Resolve
defaultMaxResolve.hint: The maximum resolve track length for new Major and Connection characters. Default: 5.

defaultStartingResolve.name: Default Starting Resolve
defaultStartingResolve.hint: The resolve value assigned to new Major characters, and the value used by Refresh Resolve on the dashboard. Default: 3.

homebrewMagicEnabled.name: Enable Homebrew Magic & Skills
homebrewMagicEnabled.hint: Show the Magic & Skills tab on Major character sheets and enable VFX casting. Disable for tables playing canonical Good Society without the homebrew additions.
